diagram_title: Gmail MCP Managed App — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Platform
systems.description: AI coding agent platform with multi-interface support

containers.name: Backend Server
containers.description: Hono-based HTTP server exposing API routes

containers.name: MCP Runtime
containers.description: Managed App lifecycle, tool conversion, and routing

components.name: GmailClient

components.name: GmailApp
components.description: Tool executors, formatters, and access token resolution

components.name: ManagedAppRegistry
components.description: App lifecycle state machine, BUILTIN_CATALOG, persistence

components.name: MCP Tool Router
components.description: Tool conversion and executor routing for managed apps

components.name: OAuth Routes
components.description: HTTP routes for OAuth connect/callback (generalized for Google apps)

components.name: gauth.json
components.description: Shared OAuth token storage for all Google apps

relationships.description: HTTP requests to Gmail API v1
setConfigKeys + enable for all Google apps
